classification_model.AIGOL_ONLY: Certified AiGOL runtime or artifact path can produce, validate, replay, or certify the capability without Codex repository mutation.
classification_model.AIGOL_PLUS_CODEX: AiGOL provides governance, routing, artifacts, constraints, or review evidence, while Codex remains needed for implementation or local command execution.
classification_model.CODEX_REQUIRED: Current activity requires Codex to edit files, create tests, scaffold new runtime code, run local validation commands, or interpret non-runtime repository state.

capability_breakdown.capability: Replay gap detection from certified replay evidence
capability_breakdown.evidence: AIGOL_REPLAY_GAP_DETECTION_RUNTIME_V1 certified in production readiness review.
Replay -> Gap Artifact -> Improvement Intent path certified without repair or execution.
AIGOL_IMPROVEMENT_INTENT_TO_PPP_BRIDGE_V1 generated PPP candidates without implementation.
AIGOL_GOVERNED_IMPLEMENTATION_REQUEST_RUNTIME_V1 accepts certified PPP candidates and emits implementation request artifacts.
AIGOL_IMPLEMENTATION_REQUEST_TO_WORKER_REQUEST_BRIDGE_V1 emits worker request artifacts without dispatch or execution.
AIGOL_WORKER_REQUEST_TO_WORKER_DISPATCH_GOVERNANCE_V1 emits dispatch-ready mandates without invoking workers.
AIGOL_WORKER_DISPATCH_TO_WORKER_INVOCATION_GOVERNANCE_V1 certified with invocation prevented.
AIGOL_WORKER_INVOCATION_TO_EXECUTION_GOVERNANCE_V1 emits execution candidates without execution.
AIGOL_GOVERNED_WORKER_EXECUTION_RUNTIME_V1 exists, but real Sapianta repository mutation still depends on Codex implementation.
AIGOL_RESULT_VALIDATION_RUNTIME_V1 validates worker execution results deterministically.
AIGOL_REPLAY_CERTIFICATION_RUNTIME_V1 emits REPLAY_CERTIFICATION_ARTIFACT_V1 without modifying validation results.

capability_breakdown.capability: ACLI lifecycle regression execution and certification
capability_breakdown.evidence: ACLI regression certification executed 28 prompts with termination_rate 1.0 and replay lineage integrity true.
Readiness criteria are governed by AiGOL artifacts, but report generation and guard tests were created by Codex.
AiGOL provides the governed route and evidence model; Codex generated the report and tests.
AIGOL_TOKEN_AND_OPERATOR_ECONOMICS_RUNTIME_V1 now emits deterministic ECONOMICS_REPORT_V1 replay evidence.
AiGOL economics runtime measures before and after states; Codex implemented the runtime refinement and implementation report.

capability_breakdown.capability: Repository code edits and test creation
capability_breakdown.evidence: Production readiness report states Codex remains required for repository mutation and test creation.

capability_breakdown.capability: New runtime scaffolding for uncertified governance capabilities
capability_breakdown.evidence: Readiness report lists runtime scaffolding for new governance capabilities as a remaining Codex dependency.

capability_breakdown.capability: Local pytest and governance conformance command execution
capability_breakdown.evidence: Validated evidence is currently produced by Codex running repository-local commands.

capability_breakdown.capability: Manual interpretation of hook conformance drift and repository release posture
capability_breakdown.evidence: Production readiness report keeps hook conformance drift visible and identifies manual remediation and interpretation dependencies.

dependency_reduction_opportunities.target: Report generation for governance analysis artifacts
dependency_reduction_opportunities.recommended_path: Create dedicated AiGOL report-writer runtimes for readiness, adoption, cost, and dependency reports.
Add governed validation-command execution runtime that records command, result, environment, and replay hash without changing code.
Keep Codex as implementation executor until worker implementation authority is separately certified; reduce dependency first through implementation request precision and validation automation.

non_goals: Do not claim AiGOL can autonomously mutate repository code.
Do not remove Codex from implementation execution until governed worker implementation authority is separately certified.
Do not remove human approval gates.
Do not hide partial governance conformance drift.
